citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 12:20 pm on
Wednesday, February 11, 2026. The inspector spoke with the licensee and was told that they were at work and unable to
leave to facilitate the inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation
of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 12:20 pm on 
Wednesday, February 11, 2026. The inspector spoke with the licensee and was told that they were at work and unable to 
leave to facilitate the inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation 
of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
